title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: Amazon threat intelligence teams identify Interlock ransomwa

sections.executive_summary: This report covers Amazon threat intelligence teams identify Interlock ransomwa - a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Affected sectors: Unknown.
